# AfiaTriage

AfiaTriage is a free, open-access clinical triage decision support tool 
for emergency department nurses and health practitioners.

## What it does
- Calculates TEWS (Triage Early Warning Score) in real time
- Assigns SATS triage colour: RED, ORANGE, YELLOW, GREEN
- Routes patients to the correct department automatically
- Supports multiple symptom entry and clinical discriminator overrides
- Designed for high-traffic A&E departments in Kenya and Africa

## URL
https://afiatriage.vercel.app

## Built by
Martin Moenga (MBBS, UoN) — Kenya

## Keywords
SATS triage, TEWS calculator, emergency triage, A&E triage tool, 
triage nurse tool, South African Triage Scale, Kenya emergency care,
clinical decision support, free triage calculator
